channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: UK politician Nigel Farage bought $1.8M house after a $6.7M crypto gift
item.description: The news follows growing calls from UK lawmakers and government officials to curb or temporarily ban crypto political donations in the country.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: Dartmouth endowment invests in Solana ETF, holds $14M in crypto exposure
item.description: The unversity’s endowment disclosed holdings in the Bitwise Solana staking ETF, Grayscale Ethereum staking ETF and BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin ETF.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Ex-Celsius exec sentenced to time served after guilty plea
item.description: Celsius‘ former chief revenue officer received a lenient sentence after his 2023 guilty plea for fraud and conspiracy to commit price manipulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Bitcoin trades at a 'discount' on Coinbase: Is a $76K retest next?
item.description: Bitcoin’s $79,000 defense proves that the Coinbase discount is driven by stablecoin volatility rather than a lack of institutional demand.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Crypto losses from North Korea hackers in 2025 rose 51% YoY: Report
item.description: The cybersecurity threats from North Korea are perpetrated by a myriad of small hacker groups deploying malware and executing social engineering scams.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: US Senate Banking Committee votes to advance CLARITY Act
item.description: Lawmakers debated amendments on ethics and other issues for a digital asset market structure bill before advancing the legislation, setting up a Senate floor vote.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: XRP whale wallets hit all-time highs: Will it push price above $1.50?
item.description: XRP whales are accumulating at record levels, increasing the chances of XRP price rise toward $2, fueled by growing XRPL activity and a bullish technical setup.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Bitcoin holds key support for $85K breakout as S&P 500 hits new all-time high
item.description: Bitcoin entered recovery mode after inflation-induced losses, while US stocks shook off macro data with broader risk appetite "skyrocketing."
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Tether-backed Oobit expands crypto payments platform into Colombia
item.description: The crypto payments company said users in Latin America are spending digital assets on groceries, restaurants and other everyday purchases.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: Strategy’s Bitcoin engine faces $28B STRC ceiling: Delphi Digital
item.description: Strategy is approaching the $28 billion issuance limit on its STRC stock, but Delphi researchers pointed to other capital-raising mechanisms that may fuel its BTC accumulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Who supports CLARITY on the US Senate Banking Committee?
item.description: The US Senate banking committee will hold a markup session on May 14 for the CLARITY Act, and support appears at least nominally bipartisan.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Aaron Wood

item.title: What's preventing Bitcoin price from breaking above $80K?
item.description: Bitcoin struggles to regain its footing above $80,000 as some buyers remain hesitant and heavy resistance builds overhead.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Clawville unleashes the first AI-native open world MMORPG into the Milady Ecosystem
item.description: The next major evolution of gaming may come from a rapidly growing digital universe where AI agents and humans coexist, compete, collaborate, learn, earn, and evolve together in real time.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: Wall Street’s tokenization boom has a liquidity problem: Axis CEO
item.description: As RWAs cross $32 billion and JPMorgan files for a new tokenized fund, Axis CEO Chris Kim argues that the industry is celebrating the wrong milestone.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yohan Yun

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs bleed $635M as BTC slips under $80K
item.description: Bitcoin ETFs saw $635 million in outflows on Wednesday, the largest since late January, as BlackRock’s IBIT led redemptions amid profit-taking and BTC swings near $80,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Tether’s T3 Crime Unit says it has frozen $450M in suspected illicit crypto
item.description: T3 Financial Crime Unit says it has frozen over $450 million tied to suspected illicit activity as stablecoin compliance pressures intensify.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Analysts are watching these Bitcoin price levels ahead of CLARITY Act vote
item.description: Bitcoin price traded below $80,000 as investors braced for the US Senate CLARITY Act markup vote that could see sudden swings toward key BTC price levels.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Law firm Fenwick & West sued for $525M over alleged role in FTX collapse
item.description: Twenty FTX victims are suing Fenwick & West, claiming the law firm didn’t just represent FTX, it helped build the infrastructure that kept the fraud running.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: JPMorgan lifts Bitcoin ETF exposure in Q1, led by BlackRock’s IBIT
item.description: The bank raised its reported IBIT holdings by 174% in the first quarter while also adding exposure to select Bitcoin, Ether and Solana-linked funds.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Altcoin season ‘quietly’ starting? Analysts spot three bullish indicators
item.description: Crypto analysts spot early altcoin recovery signals as key metrics improve and capital rotation hints at a potential altseason in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: CFTC no-action letter eases event contract reporting rules
item.description: The CFTC issued no-action relief from certain swap reporting rules for fully collateralized event contracts as prediction market disputes widen.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Bank of England reconsiders strict stablecoin regime
item.description: BoE weighs easing UK stablecoin caps and reserve demands after industry backlash, in a move that could decide whether GBP tokens can compete with dollar‑pegged rivals.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: BitGo posts wider Q1 loss despite revenue more than doubling
item.description: BitGo’s headline revenue figure doubled year-over-year to $3.8 billion, but a Bitcoin price decline and IPO-related costs pushed net losses to $60.7 million in the first quarter.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Trump’s White House weighs 250 pardons to celebrate America's 250th birthday
item.description: One of the developers behind the crypto-mixing protocol Samourai Wallet has publicly expressed hopes for a pardon, along with FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: NY judge pushes back hearing for Aave’s bid to unfreeze $71M in ETH
item.description: A New York judge has ordered supplemental briefings because Aave did not adequately outline how compounding losses could occur if the restraining notice remains in place.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brian Quarmby

item.title: Bitcoin firm Nakamoto records net loss in Q1 despite sixfold revenue growth
item.description: Nakamoto CEO David Bailey said the company is focused on scaling its Bitcoin treasury, services and trading strategies for the remainder of 2026.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Tezos launches quantum-resistant private payments prototype on testnet
item.description: The testnet system uses post-quantum cryptography and zk-STARK proofs to protect encrypted transaction data from future quantum computing attacks.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: CME and Nasdaq to launch crypto index futures featuring BTC, ETH, SOL and XRP
item.description: The contracts will offer regulated exposure to multiple cryptocurrencies through standard and micro-sized futures products, according to the company.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: Bitcoin risks slump after hitting ‘major bear market resistance’: CryptoQuant
item.description: Bitcoin’s rally may reverse as its price has hit a historic resistance level and traders appear to already be taking profits, said CryptoQuant in a note on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan
